title: TimeSeriesForecastingOutput
description: Outputs of inference for the Time Series Forecasting task. Entries in `outputs` correspond 1:1 with the request's `inputs` in order.

mean.description: Point forecast. Same shape as the corresponding input's `target`: outer dimension is time (length = prediction_length), inner dimension is channels.

quantile_predictions.description: Optional per-quantile forecasts, sorted ascending by level. Each entry has the same shape as `mean`.

values.description: Quantile forecast with the same shape as `mean`.

samples.description: Optional sample trajectories from probabilistic models. Outer dimension is the sample index; each sample has the same shape as `mean`. Present when `parameters.num_samples` was supplied and the model produces samples.

timestamps.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamps for each forecast step. Present when the input item had `start` and `parameters.frequency` was supplied.

metadata.description: Verbatim echo of the input item's `metadata`, if set.
